description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows MSVC x64 that runs on push to master and pull request open or synchronize, ignoring changes to *.md and docs/**. The workflow should run on windows-latest, check out code with full history, use ccache, install CMake, set up vcpkg, fetch test data, configure and build with CMake and vcpkg presets, and upload the resulting devilutionx.exe and dependencies as an artifact, cancelling any in-progress runs.
